The report is still at its initial state and `handoff_requested` is false. I’m waiting on the dispatcher now, then I’ll review the produced diff and run final verification.

019d5891-046c-79d0-ac67-2637bc2f51e9.message:
**Result**

`task_id: PR581-006`  
`status: completed`

I kept `ComputeSystemMetrics` and `ComputeGlobalLeaderboard` at the existing service boundary and confined the SRP cleanup to the scoped analytics files. In [models.go](/workspace/socialpredict/backend/internal/domain/analytics/models.go#L32), `MetricWithExplanation`, `MoneyCreated`, `MoneyUtilized`, and `Verification` now expose typed accessors so metric-value extraction is owned by the DTO layer instead of repeated in callers. In [repository.go](/workspace/socialpredict/backend/internal/domain/analytics/repository.go#L44), `GormRepository` now centralizes DB/context initialization, short-circuits empty-ID lookups, keeps market ID collection typed to `uint`, and makes position-calculator resolution explicit before the per-market loop.

The scoped tests were updated to assert through those model helpers instead of direct type assertions in [systemmetrics_test.go](/workspace/socialpredict/backend/internal/domain/analytics/systemmetrics_test.go#L12) and [systemmetrics_integration_test.go](/workspace/socialpredict/backend/internal/domain/analytics/systemmetrics_integration_test.go#L14). The canonical report was updated under `/workspace/socialpredict/.codex-reports/tasks/PR581-006`.

`files_changed:`
- `backend/internal/domain/analytics/models.go`
- `backend/internal/domain/analytics/repository.go`
- `backend/internal/domain/analytics/systemmetrics_test.go`
- `backend/internal/domain/analytics/systemmetrics_integration_test.go`

`checks_run:`
- `gofmt -w backend/internal/domain/analytics/{models.go,repository.go,systemmetrics_test.go,systemmetrics_integration_test.go}`
- `./scripts/run_boundary_checks.sh /workspace/socialpredict`
- `GOPATH=/workspace/.gopath GOCACHE=/workspace/.gocache GOMODCACHE=/workspace/.gomodcache go vet ./internal/domain/analytics`
- `GOPATH=/workspace/.gopath GOCACHE=/workspace/.gocache GOMODCACHE=/workspace/.gomodcache go test -count=1 ./internal/domain/analytics` twice

`follow_ups:`
- none

Assumption: I used workspace-local Go cache paths because the runner could not write to `/home/agent/go`.

item.text: The dispatcher finished with a bounded analytics-only change. I’m reviewing the diff and task summary now, then I’ll close with the final task artifact summary.

`task_id: PR581-006`  
`status: completed`

Scoped SRP cleanup is in place under the analytics-only boundary, without moving `ComputeSystemMetrics` or `ComputeGlobalLeaderboard` out of `analytics/service.go`. The main changes were typed metric accessors in [models.go](/workspace/socialpredict/backend/internal/domain/analytics/models.go), repository helper cleanup and DB/context responsibility tightening in [repository.go](/workspace/socialpredict/backend/internal/domain/analytics/repository.go), and test updates in [systemmetrics_test.go](/workspace/socialpredict/backend/internal/domain/analytics/systemmetrics_test.go) and [systemmetrics_integration_test.go](/workspace/socialpredict/backend/internal/domain/analytics/systemmetrics_integration_test.go) so assertions go through the model-layer helpers instead of ad hoc type assertions.

`files_changed:`
- `backend/internal/domain/analytics/models.go`
- `backend/internal/domain/analytics/repository.go`
- `backend/internal/domain/analytics/systemmetrics_test.go`
- `backend/internal/domain/analytics/systemmetrics_integration_test.go`

`checks_run:`

- `GOPATH=/workspace/.gopath GOCACHE=/workspace/.gocache GOMODCACHE=/workspace/.gomodcache go test -count=1 ./internal/domain/analytics` twice
